title: New Advancements
description: The mod adds a few new advancements to diversify the gameplay.
body:
> **The mod adds a few new achievements to diversify the gameplay, for example:**
1. _Get everything that has gold in any form_
2. _Climb to the highest point in the world using scaffolding_
3. _Explore all biomes, including their subspecies_
> **(avaible on _Russian_ and _English_)**
